Bigin CRM + Formspree Integration for chen.ist

This document covers the complete setup for connecting Zoho Bigin CRM to the chen.ist website via Formspree webhooks and a Cloudflare Worker bridge.

Architecture

┌──────────────┐     ┌───────────┐     ┌─────────────────────┐     ┌───────────┐
│  chen.ist    │     │ Formspree │     │ Cloudflare Worker   │     │ Zoho      │
│  static site │────▶│ (form     │────▶│ (bigin-bridge)      │────▶│ Bigin CRM │
│  forms       │POST │  handler) │POST │ api.chen.ist        │API  │           │
└──────────────┘     └───────────┘     └─────────────────────┘     └───────────┘
                      keeps working      routes by _source          contacts +
                      as backup          upserts contacts           pipelines

Why this architecture: - Website stays static (no backend, no secrets exposed) - Formspree keeps working as before (form submissions still arrive in your inbox) - Worker handles CRM sync independently (if it fails, forms still work) - Bigin manages the lifecycle (pipelines, stages, follow-ups)

Step 1: Bigin CRM Setup

1.1 Create Account

  1. Go to bigin.com and sign up for the Free plan
    • 1 user, 500 records, 5,000 API credits/day
  2. Choose the EU data center (accounts.zoho.eu) since chen.ist operates in Europe
  3. Complete the onboarding wizard

1.2 Create Pipelines

In Bigin, go to Settings → Pipelines and create:

Pipeline Stages Purpose
Academy Members Applied → Reviewed → Accepted → Active → Renewed Computer Club membership applications
Event Registrations Registered → Confirmed → Attended Hackathons, summer school, workshops
Course Inquiries Inquiry → Contacted → Enrolled Training & course interest

1.3 Add Custom Fields

Go to Settings → Modules → Contacts → Fields and add:

Field Name Type Values Maps From
Source Single Line — Formspree _source field
Application_Type Pick List individual, student, sponsor, organization Form application_type
Organization_Type Pick List company, school, university, ngo, community, personal Form org_type

Note: Company, Email, Phone, Mailing_City, and Description are built-in Bigin fields — no need to create them.

1.4 Register OAuth Application

  1. Go to Zoho API Console (EU domain)
  2. Click Add Client → choose Self Client
  3. Copy your Client ID and Client Secret
  4. Generate a grant token:
    • Scope: ZohoBigin.modules.ALL,ZohoBigin.settings.ALL
    • Time duration: 10 minutes
    • Description: bigin-bridge worker
  5. Click Create — copy the generated code
  6. Exchange the code for a refresh token:
curl -X POST "https://accounts.zoho.eu/oauth/v2/token" \
  -d "grant_type=authorization_code" \
  -d "client_id=YOUR_CLIENT_ID" \
  -d "client_secret=YOUR_CLIENT_SECRET" \
  -d "code=GENERATED_CODE"

Response:

{
  "access_token": "...",
  "refresh_token": "1000.xxxx.xxxx",
  "expires_in": 3600,
  "token_type": "Bearer"
}
  1. Save the refresh_token — you’ll need it for the Worker. The refresh token does not expire unless you revoke it.

Step 2: Deploy the Cloudflare Worker

2.1 Prerequisites

npm install -g wrangler
wrangler login

2.2 Navigate to Worker Directory

cd workers/bigin-bridge

2.3 Set Secrets

These are stored securely in Cloudflare — never in code or git:

wrangler secret put BIGIN_CLIENT_ID
# paste your Client ID, press Enter

wrangler secret put BIGIN_CLIENT_SECRET
# paste your Client Secret, press Enter

wrangler secret put BIGIN_REFRESH_TOKEN
# paste your refresh token, press Enter

2.4 Configure Region

Edit wrangler.toml if your Bigin account is NOT on the EU data center:

Data Center API Base Auth URL
EU https://www.zohoapis.eu/bigin/v2 https://accounts.zoho.eu/oauth/v2/token
US https://www.zohoapis.com/bigin/v2 https://accounts.zoho.com/oauth/v2/token
IN https://www.zohoapis.in/bigin/v2 https://accounts.zoho.in/oauth/v2/token
AU https://www.zohoapis.com.au/bigin/v2 https://accounts.zoho.com.au/oauth/v2/token

2.5 Deploy

wrangler deploy

Output:

Published bigin-bridge (x.xx sec)
  https://bigin-bridge.YOUR-SUBDOMAIN.workers.dev

2.6 Set Up Custom Domain (optional but recommended)

In Cloudflare dashboard:

  1. Go to Workers & Pages → bigin-bridge → Settings → Triggers
  2. Add Custom Domain: api.chen.ist
  3. Or add Route: api.chen.ist/webhook/* → bigin-bridge

DNS record (if using custom domain):

api.chen.ist    CNAME    bigin-bridge.YOUR-SUBDOMAIN.workers.dev    Proxied

Step 3: Connect Formspree Webhook

3.1 Get the Webhook URL

Your Worker endpoint is:

https://api.chen.ist/webhook/formspree

Or if not using custom domain:

https://bigin-bridge.YOUR-SUBDOMAIN.workers.dev/webhook/formspree

3.2 Configure in Formspree

  1. Log in to formspree.io
  2. Go to your form (mpwkaqev)
  3. Click Plugins → Webhooks
  4. Add webhook URL: your Worker URL from above
  5. Save

Note: Formspree Webhooks are available on the paid plan. If you’re on the free plan, you can use Zapier as an alternative (Formspree → Zapier Webhook → your Worker URL).

3.3 Webhook Payload Format

When a form is submitted, Formspree sends a POST to your webhook with the form data as JSON:

{
  "name": "John Doe",
  "email": "john@example.com",
  "phone": "+40123456789",
  "organization": "TechCorp",
  "org_type": "company",
  "application_type": "individual",
  "location": "Craiova, Romania",
  "message": "I want to join the Computer Club",
  "_source": "computerclub-apply",
  "_subject": "Computer Club Application",
  "_replyto": "john@example.com"
}

Step 4: How the Routing Works

The Worker reads the _source hidden field from each form and routes accordingly:

_source Value Bigin Action Pipeline
computerclub-apply Contact + Deal Academy Members → Applied
computerclub-apply-ro Contact + Deal Academy Members → Applied
contact-page Contact only —
contact-page-de / ro / sv Contact only —
newsletter-signup Contact only —
nis2-inquiry Contact + Deal Course Inquiries → Inquiry
nis2-inquiry-de / ro / sv Contact + Deal Course Inquiries → Inquiry
nis2-assessment Contact + Deal Course Inquiries → Inquiry
event-registration Contact + Deal Event Registrations → Registered
course-inquiry Contact + Deal Course Inquiries → Inquiry

Adding New Form Sources

To add a new form type:

  1. Add a <input type="hidden" name="_source" value="my-new-source"> to the form HTML
  2. Update routeToPipeline() in workers/bigin-bridge/src/index.js:
if (source.startsWith("my-new-source")) {
  return { name: "Pipeline Name", stage: "First Stage" };
}
  1. Redeploy: cd workers/bigin-bridge && wrangler deploy

Step 5: Field Mapping Reference

Form Field → Bigin Contact Field

HTML Form name Bigin Contact Field Notes
name First_Name + Last_Name Auto-split by Worker
email Email Used as duplicate check key
phone Phone
message Description
organization Company
location Mailing_City
_source Lead_Source Custom field
application_type Deal Description Stored on pipeline deal

Upsert Behavior

The Worker uses upsert (insert-or-update) with email as the duplicate check field:

  • New email → creates a new Contact
  • Existing email → updates the existing Contact’s fields
  • Pipeline deals are always created as new (one per form submission)

This means a user can submit multiple forms (e.g., contact + Computer Club application) and they’ll all be linked to the same Contact record.

Step 6: Testing

6.1 Test the Worker Directly

curl -X POST https://api.chen.ist/webhook/formspree \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -d '{
    "name": "Test User",
    "email": "test@example.com",
    "message": "Testing integration",
    "_source": "contact-page"
  }'

Expected response:

{
  "ok": true,
  "source": "contact-page",
  "result": {
    "contact_id": "123456789",
    "pipeline": null
  }
}

6.2 Test Pipeline Creation

curl -X POST https://api.chen.ist/webhook/formspree \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -d '{
    "name": "Test Applicant",
    "email": "applicant@example.com",
    "application_type": "individual",
    "location": "Craiova, Romania",
    "message": "I want to join",
    "_source": "computerclub-apply"
  }'

Expected response:

{
  "ok": true,
  "source": "computerclub-apply",
  "result": {
    "contact_id": "123456790",
    "pipeline": {
      "name": "Academy Members",
      "stage": "Applied"
    }
  }
}

6.3 Verify in Bigin

  1. Go to Bigin → Contacts — verify test contacts appear
  2. Go to Bigin → Pipelines → Academy Members — verify deals appear in “Applied” stage
  3. Click a contact — verify all fields are populated correctly

6.4 End-to-End Test

  1. Go to chen.ist/academy/programs/computerclub/#apply
  2. Fill and submit the form
  3. Check: Formspree inbox received the submission
  4. Check: Bigin has a new Contact + Academy Members deal
  5. Submit the same email again — verify the Contact is updated (not duplicated) but a new deal is created

Step 7: Monitoring & Troubleshooting

Worker Logs

wrangler tail

This streams live logs from the Worker. You’ll see: - Incoming requests - console.error messages for failures - Response status codes

Common Issues

Symptom Cause Fix
Auth failed Refresh token expired or wrong region Re-generate refresh token; check BIGIN_AUTH_URL matches your data center
Contact upsert failed: INVALID_DATA Field name mismatch Check custom field API names in Bigin → Settings → Modules → Contacts → Fields
404 on webhook Wrong URL path Ensure POST goes to /webhook/formspree exactly
Forms work but no Bigin records Webhook not firing Check Formspree → Plugins → Webhooks is configured and active
Duplicate contacts Email field empty Ensure form has name="email" and it’s required

Rate Limits

  • Bigin free plan: 5,000 API credits/day, 5 concurrent calls
  • Each form submission uses: 2-3 credits (token + upsert + optional deal)
  • Effective capacity: ~1,600-2,500 form submissions/day (well beyond needs)

Cost Summary

Service Plan Cost Limit
Formspree Current plan No change Current limits
Zoho Bigin Free $0/month 1 user, 500 records, 5K API/day
Cloudflare Worker Free $0/month 100K requests/day

Total additional cost: $0/month

Upgrade to Bigin Express (~$7/user/month) when you exceed 500 records or need multiple users.

Files Reference

File Purpose
workers/bigin-bridge/wrangler.toml Worker configuration, API URLs
workers/bigin-bridge/src/index.js Worker logic: auth, upsert, routing
docs/bigin-formspree-integration.md This document

Form _source Values in the Website

Form Location _source Value File
Contact EN contact-page contact.qmd
Contact DE contact-page-de de/contact.qmd
Contact RO contact-page-ro ro/contact.qmd
Contact SV contact-page-sv sv/contact.qmd
Computer Club EN computerclub-apply academy/programs/computerclub/index.qmd
Computer Club RO computerclub-apply-ro ro/academy/programs/computerclub/index.qmd
NIS2 EN nis2-inquiry services/nis2/index.qmd
NIS2 DE nis2-inquiry-de de/services/nis2/index.qmd
NIS2 RO nis2-inquiry-ro ro/services/nis2/index.qmd
NIS2 SV nis2-inquiry-sv sv/services/nis2/index.qmd
NIS2 Assessment nis2-assessment resources/tools/nis2-assessment.qmd
Newsletter newsletter-signup blog.qmd, resources/index.qmd, includes/email-capture.html
